zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Ferrers於1240年出生在英國德比夏爾德比時，她的父親Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby48歲，母親Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby22歲。她於1234年與William Marshal在英國英格蘭諾福爾可辛加姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1297年6月在英國威爾斯諾斯 威爾斯享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Ferrers于1240年出生在英国德比夏爾德比时，她的父亲Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby48岁，母亲Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby22岁。她于1234年与William Marshal在英国英格兰諾福爾可辛加姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1297年6月在英国威尔斯諾斯 威爾斯享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Ferrers was born in 1240, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, was 48 and her mother, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, was 22. She married William Marshal in 1234, in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in June 1297, in North Wales, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Ferrers est née en 1240, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Marshal en 1234, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en juin 1297, à North Wales, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Ferrers 1240 in Derby, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby 48 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby 22. Sie hat 1234 in Hingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom William Marshal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb im Juni 1297 im Alter von 57 Jahren in North Wales, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Ferrers è nata il nel 1240 nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Marshal nel 1234, nel Hingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel giugno 1297, nel North Wales, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Ferrersが1240年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで生まれた時，父Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derbyは48歳，母Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derbyは22歳であった。1234年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムでWilliam Marshalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1297年6月にイギリスウェールズノース ワレスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Ferrers(이)가 1240년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1234년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 잉함에서 William Marshal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 6월 영국 웨일스 노르스 월스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Ferrers nasceu em 1240, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Marshal em 1234, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em junho de 1297, em North Wales, Gales, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Ferrers родилась в 1240 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Marshal в 1234 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла июнь 1297 г. в местности норт веилесь, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

sm.Abt 1280?: mai le e tusa o le 1280 e o'o I le 1289

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Ferrers nació en 1240, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William Marshal en 1234, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en junio de 1297, en North Wales, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
